case_title: VARSHAVSKY, DAVID et al vs. PAYTON, MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARSHAVSKY, DAVID VARSHAVSKY, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT PAYTON, MARIA DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-05-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-15-1996
DECLARATION OF ISRAEL SANFT RE SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY AND APPOINTMENT OF NEW ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARSHAVSKY, DAVID VARSHAVSKY, ROSA

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1996, CONTINUED TO JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR SUBSTITUTION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-24-1997, CONTINUED TO MAR-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1997, CONTINUED TO APR-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-21-1997, CONTINUED TO JUN-06-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1 FOR SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SANFT, ISRAEL SUBSTITUTED FOR NATALI, DENNIS B AS ATTORNEY FOR VARSHAVSKY, DAVID VARSHAVSKY, ROSA

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-23-1997, CONTINUED TO JAN-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CONTINUED PURSUANT TO COURT INSTRUCTION - FOR SUBSTITUTION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-16-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ISRAEL SANFT. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY. HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
